response.justification: While the candidate exceeds the minimum 15-year experience requirement and has strong full-stack engineering credentials, there is a critical gap in AI expertise—the core focus of this principal-level role. The resume shows no demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI specialization. Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq (14 months) is too new and unvalidated to offset the complete absence of an AI strategy background required for advising customers and driving AI differentiation.
strengths: Exceeds minimum experience requirement with 19 years across multiple technical domains
Proven founder and entrepreneurial experience building open-source platforms
Full-stack engineering competency with some cloud (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) and infrastructure exposure
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; no formal AI or machine learning expertise
No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized expertise in AI—central to the role's strategic responsibilities
Career breadth (web, mobile, embedded, geo-data) suggests generalist rather than specialized AI/cloud strategy focus

key_factors.factor: Absence of AI expertise and products
Missing advanced degree in AI domain
